mapper.select: SELECT * FROM members WHERE username=%s AND active=1
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET theme=%s, font_size=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT username FROM members WHERE name=%s AND affiliate LIKE %s
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET password=%s, first_login=0 WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM members WHERE id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET password=%s, first_login=1 WHERE id=%s
UPDATE members SET username=%s, affiliate=%s, department=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM menu_likes WHERE menu_id=%s AND member_id=%s
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM menu_likes WHERE menu_id=%s AND member_id=%s
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_likes(menu_id,member_id) VALUES(%s,%s) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM menu_likes WHERE menu_id=%s
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET like_count=%s WHERE id=%s
mapper.select: SELECT ml.menu_id, m.name as menu_name, m.emoji, m.price, r.id as restaurant_id, r.name as restaurant_name FROM menu_likes ml JOIN menus m ON m.id = ml.menu_id JOIN restaurants r ON r.id = m.restaurant_id WHERE ml.member_id=%s ORDER BY ml.liked_at DESC
SELECT menu_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM menu_likes GROUP BY menu_id
